bearerAuth.description: API key authentication. Use your API key as the bearer token.

UnauthorizedError.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid API key

message.example: Missing or invalid Authorization header. Expected: Bearer <api_key>
No valid companies found for identifiers

InternalServerError.description: Internal Server Error - Server error occurred

message.example: Missing or invalid Authorization header. Expected: Bearer <api_key>
No valid company found for identifier

value.description: Numeric value for the metric (if available)

depth.description: Depth level in the tree structure (0 for root items)

isTotal.description: Indicates if this item is a total (sum of siblings)

children.description: Nested child facts with facts schema (only present if there are children)
Nested child facts with facts schema (only present if there are children)

WebSocketNewFilingEvent.description: Broadcast when a new SEC filing finishes processing

WebSocketPingEvent.description: Server heartbeat payload sent when protocol-level ping is unavailable

get.description: Health check endpoint.
List all available companies.

cik.description: CIK with or without leading zeros

get.description: Search companies by ticker or name.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search text to match against ticker (prefix) or name (contains)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of companies to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Pagination offset

count.description: Total matched companies (may be limited by pagination)

companies.description: Matched companies ordered by ticker

cik.description: CIK with or without leading zeros

next_url.description: URL for the next page (includes next offset and same limit). Omitted when no next page exists.

get.description: Fetch latest complete financial statements snapshot for multiple companies.

parameters.description: Comma-separated list of ticker symbols or CIKs (1-10 identifiers)

parameters.description: Calendar year. For annual periods, only calendar_year is needed. For non-annual periods, must be provided together with calendar_quarter.

parameters.description: Calendar quarter (1-4). For annual periods, should not be provided. For non-annual periods, must be provided together with calendar_year.

get.description: Fetch financial ratios for a company.

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: Ticker symbol or CIK

parameters.name: fiscal_period_type
parameters.description: Type of fiscal period: 'quarterly' (Q1-Q4), 'annual' (full year), 'ytd' (year-to-date), 'ttm' (trailing twelve months)

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Filter by ratio category: valuation, profitability, liquidity, solvency

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort direction for periods by period_end: 'asc' (oldest first), 'desc' (newest first)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of periods per ticker (1-100)

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of periods to skip for pagination

companies.description: List of companies with their financial ratios

periods.description: List of periods with financial ratios

facts.description: Ratio facts grouped by category, where each category contains key-value pairs of metric names and their numeric values

next_url.description: URL for the next page (includes next offset and same limit). Omitted when no next page exists.

get.description: Fetch compound annual growth rate (CAGR) metrics for a company.

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: Ticker symbol or CIK

parameters.name: period_years
parameters.description: CAGR calculation period in years: 3, 5, 10

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort direction for periods by period_end: 'asc' (oldest first), 'desc' (newest first)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of periods per ticker (1-100)

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of periods to skip for pagination

companies.description: List of companies with their CAGR metrics

periods.description: List of periods with CAGR metrics

fiscal_period_type.description: Type of fiscal period (always 'annual' for CAGR)

additionalProperties.description: CAGR value for the metric keyed by metric_id

next_url.description: URL for the next page (includes next offset and same limit). Omitted when no next page exists.

get.description: Fetch period-over-period growth metrics for a company.

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: Ticker symbol or CIK

parameters.name: fiscal_period_type
parameters.description: Type of fiscal period: 'quarterly' (Q1-Q4), 'annual' (full year), 'ytd' (year-to-date), 'ttm' (trailing twelve months)

parameters.name: growth_type
parameters.description: Filter by growth type: year_over_year, quarter_over_quarter

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort direction for periods by period_end: 'asc' (oldest first), 'desc' (newest first)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of periods per ticker (1-100)

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of periods to skip for pagination

companies.description: List of companies with their growth metrics

periods.description: List of periods with growth metrics

facts.description: Nested object: growth_type (year_over_year, quarter_over_quarter) -> { metric_id: value }

additionalProperties.description: Growth type groups keyed by growth_type
Growth rate value for the metric keyed by metric_id

next_url.description: URL for the next page (includes next offset and same limit). Omitted when no next page exists.

get.description: Fetch segmented financial data for a company. Returns financial facts broken down by business segments.

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: Ticker symbol or CIK

parameters.name: fiscal_period_type
parameters.description: Type of fiscal period: 'quarterly' (Q1-Q4), 'annual' (full year), 'ytd' (year-to-date), 'ttm' (trailing twelve months)

parameters.name: segment_id
parameters.description: Filter by segment ID: seg_revenue_product, seg_revenue_geographic, seg_revenue_business_segment, seg_cost_of_revenue_business_segment, seg_research_and_development_expenses_business_segment, seg_selling_and_marketing_expenses_business_segment, seg_general_and_administrative_expenses_business_segment

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort direction for periods by period_end: 'asc' (oldest first), 'desc' (newest first)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of periods per ticker (1-100)

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of periods to skip for pagination

companies.description: Companies with segmented financial facts

facts.description: Facts grouped by metric_id, each containing array of segment values

next_url.description: URL for the next page (includes next offset and same limit). Omitted when no next page exists.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort direction for periods by period_end: 'asc' (oldest first), 'desc' (newest first)

parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Number of periods to skip for pagination

cik.description: Company CIK (with or without leading zeros)

get.description: Fetch institutional transaction activity (position changes between periods).

parameters.name: cik
parameters.description: Institution CIK (at least one of cik or identifier required)

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: Company ticker symbol or CIK (at least one of cik or identifier required)

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Filter transactions with period_end_new on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: Filter transactions with period_end_new on or before this date (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by transaction type: new_buy, added, reduced, sold_out

parameters.name: calendar_year
parameters.description: Filter by calendar year (of new position)

parameters.name: calendar_quarter
parameters.description: Filter by calendar quarter (of new position)

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort direction by period_end_new: 'asc' (oldest first), 'desc' (newest first)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of transactions to return (1-1000)

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of transactions to skip for pagination

next_url.description: URL for the next page (includes next offset and same limit). Omitted when no next page exists.

type.description: Transaction type: new_buy, added, reduced, sold_out

change_shares_or_principal_amount_absolu.description: Absolute change in shares or principal

change_shares_or_principal_amount_percen.description: Percent change in shares or principal

get.description: List institutional investors, optionally filtered by CIKs.

parameters.name: ciks
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of CIKs (Central Index Keys)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of institutions to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Pagination offset

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort direction for institutions by name

cik.description: Institution CIK (with or without leading zeros)

next_url.description: URL for the next page (includes next offset and same limit). Omitted when no next page exists.

get.description: Fetch insider transactions for a specific company.

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: Company ticker symbol or CIK

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Filter transactions filed on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: Filter transactions filed on or before this date (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: acquired_disposed
parameters.description: Filter by acquisition (A) or disposition (D)

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort direction by filed_at date

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of transactions to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of transactions to skip for pagination

next_url.description: URL for the next page (includes next offset and same limit). Omitted when no next page exists.

acquired_disposed.description: A for acquisition, D for disposition

get.description: Fetch SEC filings for a company.

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: Ticker symbol or CIK

parameters.name: form_type
parameters.description: SEC form type filter (e.g., 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K, 3, 4, 5, 13F-HR). Leave empty to return all form types.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort direction for filings by filing_date

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of filings to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of filings to skip for pagination

companies.description: Companies with filings

next_url.description: URL for the next page (includes next offset and same limit). Omitted when no next page exists.

get.description: Search SEC filings using natural language queries. Returns AI-generated answers with source citations from official SEC documents (10-K, 10-Q, 8-K).

parameters.name: request
parameters.description: Natural language search request for SEC filing information (e.g., 'What are Apple's main risk factors?')

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: Ticker symbol or CIK to filter search results to a specific company

parameters.name: accession_number
parameters.description: Accession number to filter search results to a specific filing

text.description: The search response text answering the query

sources.description: List of SEC filing sources that were used to generate the response

get.description: Fetch SEC filing sections for a company. Returns parsed sections from 10-Q, 10-K, or 8-K filings.

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: Ticker symbol or CIK

parameters.name: form_type
parameters.description: SEC form type. Filter requirements vary: 8-K requires accession_number; 10-K requires accession_number or fiscal_year; 10-Q requires accession_number or fiscal_year+fiscal_quarter.

parameters.name: section_id
parameters.description: Optional section ID. If not specified, all sections from the filing are returned.

parameters.name: accession_number
parameters.description: SEC accession number of the filing

parameters.name: fiscal_year
parameters.description: Fiscal year

parameters.name: fiscal_quarter
parameters.description: Fiscal quarter (1-4). Required for 10-Q when using fiscal_year filter.

companies.description: Companies with requested filing sections

html_tag_id.description: HTML element ID for section anchor

get.description: List available SEC filing form types present in the filings table. Optionally filter by a company identifier (ticker or CIK).

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: Optional ticker symbol or CIK. If omitted, returns form types across all filings.

form_types.description: Deduplicated SEC form types present in the filings table

get.description: Fetch market holidays.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort direction for holidays by date

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of holidays to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of holidays to skip for pagination

next_url.description: URL for the next page (includes next offset and same limit). Omitted when no next page exists.

get.description: List all available standardized metrics (income statement, balance sheet, cash flow statement, ratios, growth, CAGR, and segmented).
List all available section IDs for SEC filings, grouped by form type (10-K, 10-Q, 8-K).

form_types.description: Supported form types with their section IDs

sections.description: Sections available for the form type

ws.description: Upgrade to a WebSocket connection to receive real-time SEC filing events. Authenticate with API Key.

parameters.name: api_key
parameters.description: API key used for WebSocket authentication

403.description: Forbidden - plan does not allow WebSocket connections

429.description: Too Many Requests - concurrent connection limit exceeded

x-events.name: new_filing
x-events.description: Emitted when a new company SEC filing is available

x-events.name: ping
x-events.description: Heartbeat payload for clients that do not support protocol-level pings, should not be required if using a WebSocket library
